FQA001_arrowdown_focus_into_dropdown.description: ArrowDown on a top-level menu button now moves focus to the first dropdown item
FQA001_arrowdown_focus_into_dropdown.evidence: Focus on ABOUT button, press ArrowDown, inject overlay: 'ArrowDown focus: A | role=none | text=Who We Are | aria-expanded=n/a'. Focus moved to the <a> link inside the first <li role=menuitem>. Dropdown visually open. CONFIRMED.
FQA001_arrowdown_focus_into_dropdown.codeChange: HeaderMain.js line 4: const submenuItemSelector = '[role="menuitem"] a, [role="menuitem"] button'. Applied at line ~353 (static items snapshot), line ~363 (currentItems re-query in handleSubmenuKeydown), line ~431 (freshItems in ArrowDown rAF), line ~447 (freshItems in ArrowUp rAF).

FQA002_arrowup_focus_into_dropdown_last.description: ArrowUp on a top-level menu button now moves focus to the last dropdown item
FQA002_arrowup_focus_into_dropdown_last.evidence: Focus on ABOUT button, press ArrowUp, inject overlay: 'ArrowUp focus: A | role=none | text=Work at Ignite'. Focus moved to the last <a> in the ABOUT submenu (3 items: Who We Are, Our Impact, Work at Ignite). CONFIRMED.

FQA001_cascades_arrowdown_within_dropdow.description: ArrowDown within an open dropdown advances focus to the next item
FQA001_cascades_arrowdown_within_dropdow.evidence: ArrowDown opens to 'Who We Are' (first), second ArrowDown: '2nd ArrowDown: A | role=none | text=Our Impact'. handleSubmenuKeydown now fires because focus is on a focusable <a> inside the submenu. CONFIRMED.

FQA001_cascades_arrowup_within_dropdown.description: ArrowUp within an open dropdown wraps focus to the last item when on first item
FQA001_cascades_arrowup_within_dropdown.evidence: ArrowDown to 'Who We Are' (first), then ArrowUp: 'ArrowDown+ArrowUp: A | text=Work at Ignite'. Correct wrap-around to last item. CONFIRMED.

FQA001_cascades_tab_closes_submenu.description: Tab key while inside open submenu now closes it and moves focus forward
FQA001_cascades_tab_closes_submenu.evidence: ArrowDown to 'Who We Are', press Tab: 'Tab: aria-exp=false | hidden=true | focus=Health'. Submenu closed (aria-expanded=false, hidden class present), focus advanced to next top-level item (HEALTH button). CONFIRMED.

FQA003_aria_label_on_menubar.description: ul[role=menubar] now has aria-label='Main navigation' on all 9 rendered instances
FQA003_aria_label_on_menubar.evidence: page_audit menubar_aria_label: found=true, count=1 on all 9 sections (indices 0–8). PHP line 150: aria-label="<?php esc_attr_e('Main navigation', 'takt'); ?>". All instances confirmed.

FQA004_aria_orientation_on_menubar.description: ul[role=menubar] now has aria-orientation='horizontal' on all 9 rendered instances
FQA004_aria_orientation_on_menubar.evidence: page_audit menubar_aria_orientation: found=true, count=1 on all 9 sections. PHP line 150: aria-orientation="horizontal". All instances confirmed.

escape_closes_and_returns_focus.evidence: ArrowDown to 'Who We Are', press Escape: 'Escape: focus=About | aria-exp=false | hidden=true'. Submenu closed, focus on ABOUT trigger. CONFIRMED.

arrowright_toplevel_navigation.evidence: Focus ABOUT, ArrowRight: 'ArrowRight: BUTTON | text=Health'. Correct lateral navigation. CONFIRMED.

cta_hover_accent.evidence: page_audit cta_hover_accent found=true on all 9 sections. hover:text-accent present on all CTA links.

transition_transform_opacity.evidence: page_audit querySelector limitation with special chars (comma inside brackets) returns false. Confirmed directly: all 9 sections include 'transition-[transform,opacity]' in their classes arrays. transition-all absent.

submenu_minw.evidence: page_audit submenu_minw: true on sections 0, 2, 5, 7 (those with submenus); false on 1, 3, 4, 6, 8 (no submenus). Correct distribution.

menubar_role.evidence: page_audit menubar_role found=true, count=1 on all 9 sections.
